{{Quote|The Imperial Star Destroyers ''Bombard'' and ''Crusader'' limped back to Ord Grovner Naval Base this week after dealing a death-blow to the arrogant and once-almighty Eyttyrmin Pirates of the Khuiumin system.|TriNebulon News|<ref name="aj6">{{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>}}
'''Ord Grovner''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] near [[Courkrus]]. Originally an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]], the planet served as a staging area for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] task force, led by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Freeda]], which wiped out the [[Eyttyrmin Batiiv]] pirates.

{{Planet-stub}}
